overall.description: Third-person game engine footage showing a female character walking steadily across a vast white salt flat alongside a calm turquoise ocean. The environment is minimalist and serene, with clear blue skies and distant land visible on the horizon. On-screen UI elements indicate keyboard controls for movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal salt flat with ocean shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the white salt flat terrain toward the distant horizon, with arms swinging naturally

entered.detail: calm turquoise body of water stretching to the horizon on the left side
vast white cracked salt flat ground extending in all directions
low-lying landmass visible on the horizon with subtle elevation changes
cloudless blue sky gradient from light to deep blue overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily across an expansive white salt flat under a clear blue sky. To the left, a calm turquoise ocean stretches to the horizon, while distant low-lying land remains visible ahead. The environment is completely empty and serene, with no vegetation, structures, or other characters present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a minimalist landscape where a vast white salt flat meets a serene turquoise ocean. It begins with the character walking steadily across the expansive white terrain under a clear blue sky. As the camera advances, the view maintains a steady focus on the contrast between the bright salt crust and the calm waters stretching toward the horizon. The scene then opens further to reveal distant low-lying land ahead, emphasizing the empty and serene nature of the environment. Finally, the movement continues in a straight trajectory, keeping the horizon line stable as the character traverses the featureless expanse.
